title: Funimation Evangelion 333 coming out February 2 2016
wikitext:
[]: Funimation: Evangelion 3.33 coming out February 2 2016             Quote Post by vito » Sat Oct 10, 2015 5:40 pm That's what people say was reported at their panel.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Oct 10, 2015 5:54 pm yay I am seeing that too nothing posted on Funi' social stuff though tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:17 pm About fucking time.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:22 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Just linked on reddit: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:42 pm I blame Anno's annoying perfectionism rather than Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:48 pm Umm, BD/DVD combo? Uh oh, are they gonna jack up the price, then?

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:56 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Umm, BD/DVD combo? Uh oh, are they gonna jack up the price, then?

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Oct 10, 2015 7:59 pm I don't think it will, SSD. DBZ: Resurrection F is also a BD/DVD combo and it's listed for the same price. I think the combo might be replacing the standard blu-ray release.

[]:             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Sat Oct 10, 2015 8:11 pm xPearse wrote: About fucking time.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Oct 10, 2015 8:16 pm Ray wrote: I blame Anno's annoying perfectionism rather than Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 10, 2015 8:57 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: If it is a combo I wonder if it is their way of trying to say sorry for the delay

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Oct 10, 2015 9:08 pm hui43210 wrote: Wrong, the re-dub was done Aug 2014, Funi has been sitting on it since then, my theory is they wanted to focus on promoting DBZ, as that is their golden egg laying goose.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Oct 10, 2015 9:21 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: If they never give a flat out answer as to why it took so long, that doesn't give the green light to make up reasons.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Oct 10, 2015 9:28 pm So now, there' only three and half months to wait. I'm starting to wonder if it's more foolish to wait those months or get the HK edition now? I don't watch the dub on my Funi DVDs of the first two films, so am I missing anything important here? I don't know what to do after all this time.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Oct 10, 2015 9:31 pm If you've already waited so long, the extra three months shouldn't be all that bad. Me, I bought the Japanese BD and torrented UTW's copy. The Funimation BD/DVD is a novelty to me at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by MoroNoKimi » Sat Oct 10, 2015 10:00 pm About goddamn time. I really can't stand Funi tbh; I hope that if the NGE blurays get a US release, someone OTHER than them gets the license.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Oct 10, 2015 10:00 pm ^^ A novelty I'll certainly purchase. Like I said, I want that translated booklet. And I would also like to not have to plug in a computer to my TV overtime I want to watch Eva Q. That would be nice as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 10, 2015 10:47 pm "They say everything is bigger in Texas, so we’re bringing that mentality with us to the Big Apple!" , oh Funi, you so silly. News/Front Page updated with what little info we know, plus the standard ordering links: http://www.evageeks.org/2015/10/funi-eva-3-33-bd-dvd-feb-2nd/

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Oct 10, 2015 10:58 pm I hope that means that the spanish dub is coming soon!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Oct 10, 2015 11:11 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Only took 'em more than four years.
